title: Nexus WorldKbRelationshipInput
description: Author-editable payload for a World KB relationship (V1.74; V1.76 adds optional needs_review for promotion). Supplied inside WorldKbPatchRelationshipRequest for add/update actions.

source_entity_id.description: Source KeyBlock id. Must be a non-deleted entity in the same world.

target_entity_id.description: Target KeyBlock id. Must be a non-deleted entity in the same world and different from source_entity_id.

custom_label.description: Required narrative label when relation_type is `custom`; ignored for core enum values.

symmetric.description: When true, the graph read emits a derived reverse projection sharing the same relationship_id.

confidence.description: Optional author/assertion confidence, display-only in V1.74.

source_anchor_ids.description: Optional source-anchor projection ids grounding this relationship.

needs_review.description: V1.76: optional. When omitted on add, defaults to false (author-confirmed). When provided on update, sets the needs_review gate (false = promote/confirm the suggestion).
